# cloudfly_regions (Data Source)

Lists all available CloudFly regions.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "cloudfly_regions" "all" {}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Read-Only

- `regions` (Attributes List) List of regions. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--regions))

<a id="nestedatt--regions"></a>
### Nested Schema for `regions`

Read-Only:

- `description` (String)
- `id` (String)
- `name` (String)
